stages.concept:
# Unit 065: to부정사의 부사적 용법 (결과, 판단의 근거) - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **to부정사의 부사적 용법** 중 **결과**와 **판단의 근거**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **결과** — ~해서 결국 …하다

> She grew up **to be** a famous singer.
> 그녀는 자라서 유명한 가수가 되었다.

> He lived **to be** 100 years old.
> 그는 100세까지 살았다.

> She woke up **to find** herself in the hospital.
> 그녀는 깨어나니 자신이 병원에 있었다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **too ~ to** 구문 — 너무 ~해서 …할 수 없다

> He is **too** young **to** drive a car.
> 그는 너무 어려서 차를 운전할 수 없다.

> The box is **too** heavy **to** carry.
> 그 상자는 너무 무거워서 나를 수 없다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **enough to** 구문 — 충분히 ~해서 …할 수 있다

> She is old **enough to** vote.
> 그녀는 투표할 수 있을 만큼 충분히 나이가 들었다.

> He runs fast **enough to** win the race.
> 그는 경주에서 이길 만큼 충분히 빨리 달린다.

**Q. 다음 문장의 빈칸에 알맞은 것을 고르세요.**
"The box is (       ) heavy to carry."
1. very
2. too ✅
3. enough

👩‍🏫 선생님: 맞아요. "너무 무거워서 나를 수 없다"는 의미의 부정적 결과를 나타낼 때는 too를 쓴답니다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **판단의 근거** — ~하다니

> You must be brave **to say** that.
> 그런 말을 하다니 넌 용감함에 틀림없다.

> She must be smart **to solve** that problem.
> 그 문제를 풀다니 그녀는 똑똑함에 틀림없다.

🧑‍🎓 학생: 결과(~해서 …되다), too ~ to(너무 ~해서 못한다), enough to(충분히 ~해서 한다), 판단의 근거(~하다니)! 잘 정리할게요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 065: to부정사의 부사적 용법 결과, 판단의 근거 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임에 해당하는 것을 고르시오.
You must like Amy to sit next to her. (     )
> **정답** 판단의 근거

---

**02.** He grew up to become a teacher.
> **정답** 결과

---

**03.** She must be smart to solve that problem.
> **정답** 판단의 근거

---

**04.** He lived to be 100 years old.
> **정답** 결과

---

**05.** You must be hungry to eat three bowls of rice.
> **정답** 판단의 근거

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
He grew up become a doctor.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** become → to become

---

**07.** She must be kind helping everyone.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** helping → to help

---

**08.** He woke up finding himself in the hospital.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** finding → to find

---

**09.** You must be brave doing that alone.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** doing → to do

---

**10.** She lived being 90 years old.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** being → to be

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그는 자라서 과학자가 되었다.
He grew up a scientist.
> **정답** to become

---

**12.** 너는 그것을 혼자 하다니 용감한 게 틀림없다.
You must be brave that alone.
> **정답** to do

---

**13.** 그녀는 깨어나 보니 병원에 있었다.
She woke up herself in the hospital.
> **정답** to find

---

**14.** 그 문제를 풀다니 너는 똑똑한 게 틀림없다.
You must be smart the problem.
> **정답** to solve

---

**15.** 그는 살아서 95세가 되었다.
He lived 95 years old.
> **정답** to be

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
그녀는 자라서 선생님이 되었다.
She up grew to become a teacher
> **정답** She / grew / up / to / become / a / teacher

---

**17.** 그것을 하다니 너는 용감한 게 틀림없다.
must You be brave to that do
> **정답** You / must / be / brave / to / do / that

---

**18.** 그는 깨어나 보니 유명해져 있었다.
He up woke to famous find himself
> **정답** He / woke / up / to / find / himself / famous

---

**19.** 그렇게 많이 먹다니 배가 고팠던 게 틀림없다.
must You have been hungry to eat so much
> **정답** You / must / have / been / hungry / to / eat / so / much

---

**20.** 그는 커서 훌륭한 음악가가 되었다.
grew He up to a great become musician
> **정답** He / grew / up / to / become / a / great / musician
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 065: to부정사의 부사적 용법 결과, 판단의 근거 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 말을 고르시오.
He was so clever __________ the top student in the
class.
At last, he grew up __________ a doctor.
was
to be
being
be
> **정답** to be

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
The girl did her best only ___________ a bad grade.
But she didn't give up. Finally, she grew up
__________ a lawyer.
be getting - to becoming
got - became
to get - becoming
to get - to become
> **정답** to get - to become

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
Amy must be a genius _________ this difficult
math problem.
Tom woke up ________ himself in an empty room.
to solve - to find
solve - find
to solving - to finding
solving - finding
> **정답** to solve - to find

---

**04.** 다음 보기의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> Amy must be very hungry to eat the whole
pizza.
I went out to get some fresh air.
The kid grew up to be taller than his father.
He was so kind to help poor people.
My mom was so happy to see her sister again.
> **정답** He was so kind to help poor people.

---

**05.** 다음 보기의 밑줄 친 부분과 같은 쓰임으로 쓰인
to부정사를 고르시오.
<보기> The girl grew up to become a singer.
Amy was surprised to hear that she passed
the interview.
She must be foolish to miss the chance.
They gathered to celebrate their mother's
birthday.
He left his hometown never to return.
> **정답** He left his hometown never to return.

---

**06.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 to부정사가 부사적 쓰임으로 쓰인 것을
모두 고르시오. [2개]
My plan is to do the laundry this afternoon.
The man is very polite to knock before he
comes in.
A mother bought her son a cute doll to play
with.
Tom tried hard, only to give up.
• polite 예의바른
> **정답** Tom tried hard, only to give up., The man is very
polite to knock before he comes in.

---

**07.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 to부정사가 부사적 쓰임으로 쓰인 것을
모두 고르시오. [2개]
Mom wants to skip her yoga class today.
You must be tired to fall asleep so quickly.
Tom was holding some books to return.
She woke up to find the house empty.
> **정답** She woke up to find the house empty., You must be
tired to fall asleep so quickly.

---

**08.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Tom은 열심히 공부했지만 결국 시험에 떨어졌다.
Tom studied hard, only to fail on the exams.
Tom studied hard to only fail on the exams.
Tom studied hard to only failing on the
exams.
Tom studied hard to only failed on the
exams.
> **정답** Tom studied hard, only to fail on the exams.

---

**09.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
나의 할아버지는 90세까지 사셨다.
My grandfather lived to be 90 years old.
My grandfather lived be 90 years old.
My grandfather lived being 90 years old.
My grandfather lived to being 90 years old.
> **정답** My grandfather lived to be 90 years old.

---

**10.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Tom은 일어나 동생이 울고 있는 것을 봤다.
Tom woke up to see his sister crying.
Tom woke up to seeing his sister crying.
Tom woke up see his sister crying.
Tom woke up seeing his sister crying.
> **정답** Tom woke up to see his sister crying.

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Jake tried his best, only to lose the battle.
She grew up to be a well-known writer.
Amy must be lazy getting up in the
afternoon.
The kid woke up to find his mother gone.
> **정답** Amy must be lazy getting up in the afternoon.

---

**12.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Amy is rude not to respect adults.
You are very brave to save her from the
danger.
Tom opened his wallet to find it empty.
The man must be upset to not get concert
tickets.
> **정답** The man must be upset to not get concert tickets.

---

**13.** 다음 보기의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> Amy grew up to be a computer programmer.
The boy asked for some seeds to plant.
My grandfather lived to be ninety.
It is important to follow traffic rules.
My father decided not to sell the house.
> **정답** My grandfather lived to be ninety.

---

**14.** 다음 보기의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> Amy was foolish to believe him.
We came here to help you.
It is your duty to attend the meeting.
The waiter is very kind to offer me a free drink.
Tom passed me a helmet to put on.
> **정답** The waiter is very kind to offer me a free drink.

---

**15.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
Woman usually live up becoming a mother.
You must be careless spill the coffee.
Tom is very lucky to win the first place.
The woman was very kind to giving me a ride
home.
• spill 쏟다
> **정답** Tom is very lucky to win the first place.

---

**16.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐쓰시오.
Mom must be angry to yelling
at her son.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** yelling → yell

---

**17.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐쓰시오.
He got the job, only lose it
later for no reason.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** lose → to lose

---

**18.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐쓰시오.
Amy arrived at the market to
never remember what to buy.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** to never → never to

---

**19.** 다음 글에서 부사적 쓰임으로 쓰인 to부정사를 모두
고르시오. (2개)
I planned ① to go to the concert of my favorite singer
with my friend. We wanted ② to get the singer's
autograph. We were so excited ③ to see the singer.
We met in front of my house and took a bus. We
arrived a little late at the concert hall. We entered the
hall, only ④ to find the concert had already begun.
> **정답** 3, 4

---

**20.** 다음 글에서 부사적 쓰임으로 쓰인 to부정사를 모두
고르시오. (2개)
There was an old woman on the street. She wanted ①
to go to a hospital, but she was lost. She was looking
for somebody ② to help her. She asked a boy how ③
to get to the hospital. He took her to the hospital. She
was so pleased ④ to get to the hospital. The boy was
very kind ⑤ to help her.
> **정답** 4, 5
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 065 to부정사의 부사적 용법 결과, 판단의 근거중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오. (to부정사를 사용할
것)
그녀는 자라서 외교관이 되었다. [grow up, be]
She  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  a diplomat.
• diplomat 외교관
정답 grew, up, to, be

---

**02.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
오전내내 잠을 자는 것을 보니 엄마는 피곤함에 틀림없다.
[be tired, sleep]
Mom  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  all
morning.
정답 must, be, tired, to, sleep

---

**03.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
지나는 열심히 공부했지만 결국 시험에 떨어졌다. [fail]
Gina studied hard, only  (     )   (     )  the test.
정답 to, fail

---

**04.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오.
진실을 말하는 것을 보니, 그녀는 정직하다.
힌트 (     ) honest, is, tell, to
She  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  the truth.
정답 is, honest, to, tell

---

**05.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
힌트 (     ) lazy, late
A: Was the new worker late for a meeting?
B: Yes, he must  (     )  very  (     )   (     )  
 for the meeting.
정답 be, lazy, to, be, late

---

**06.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
힌트 (     ) shut down, his business
A: Is his business going well?
B: No, he worked hard, only  (     )   (     )  
  (     ) .
정답 to, shut, down, his, business

---

**07.** 주어진 두 문장과 같은 뜻이 되도록 문장을 완성하시오.
(to 부정사로 쓸 것)
She was kind.
She drove me to the train station.
She was kind  (     )   (     )   (     )  to the train
station.
정답 to, drive, me

---

**08.** 주어진 두 문장과 같은 뜻이 되도록 문장을 완성하시오.
(to 부정사로 쓸 것)
He was stupid.
He didn't accept their proposal.
He was stupid  (     )   (     )   (     )  their proposal.
• accept 받아들이다
• proposal 제안
정답 not, to, accept

---

**09.** 주어진 문장이 같은 뜻이 되도록 문장을 완성하시오. (to
부정사로 쓸 것)
We did our best but we lost the game.
We did our best,  (     )   (     )   (     )  
.
정답 only, to, lose, the, game

---

**10.** 주어진 동사를 활용하여 글을 완성하시오.
buy / come / find / spend / give
Benjamin had some money  (     ) . He
planned  (     )  a new bike. He asked his
mother  (     )  with him. They together
went to a bike store. After they bought a bike, he
happily brought it home. He arrived home
 out that the bike had a flat tire. He
called the store. The man at the store promised
 a refund next day.
• flat tire 펑크난 타이어
• refund 환불
정답 to spend, to buy, to come, to find, to give

---

# Unit 065: to부정사의 부사적 용법 결과, 판단의 근거 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 말을 고르시오.
He was so smart __________ the top student in the class.
At last, he grew up __________ a scientist. was to be being be
> 정답: to be

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
The boy did his best only ___________ a low score.
But he didn't give up.
Finally, he grew up __________ a teacher. be getting - to becoming got - became to get - becoming to get - to become
> 정답: to get - to become

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Amy must be a genius _________ this difficult science problem.
Tom woke up ________ himself in a dark room. to solve - to find solve - find to solving - to finding solving - finding
> 정답: to solve - to find

---

**04.** 다음 보기의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> Amy must be very hungry to eat the whole cake.
I went out to get some fresh air.
The boy grew up to be taller than his dad.
He was so kind to help sick animals.
My mom was so happy to see her brother again.
> 정답: He was so kind to help sick animals.

---

**05.** 다음 보기의 밑줄 친 부분과 같은 쓰임으로 쓰인 to부정사를 고르시오.
<보기> The boy grew up to become an artist.
Amy was surprised to hear that she passed the audition.
She must be foolish to miss the chance.
They gathered to celebrate their friend's birthday.
He left his town never to return.
> 정답: He left his town never to return.

---

**06.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 to부정사가 부사적 쓰임으로 쓰인 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
My plan is to do the cleaning this afternoon.
The boy is very polite to knock before he comes in.
A mom bought her son a cute robot to play with.
Tom tried hard, only to give up.
> 정답: Tom tried hard, only to give up., The boy is very

---

**07.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 to부정사가 부사적 쓰임으로 쓰인 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Mom wants to skip her exercise class today.
You must be tired to fall asleep so quickly.
Tom was holding some books to return.
She woke up to find the classroom empty.
> 정답: She woke up to find the classroom empty., You must be

---

**08.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Tom은 열심히 공부했지만 결국 시험에 떨어졌다.
Tom studied hard, only to fail on the tests.
Tom studied hard to only fail on the tests.
Tom studied hard to only failing on the tests.
Tom studied hard to only failed on the tests.
> 정답: Tom studied hard, only to fail on the tests.

---

**09.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
나의 할머니는 95세까지 사셨다.
My grandmother lived to be 95 years old.
My grandmother lived be 95 years old.
My grandmother lived  being 95 years old.
My grandmother lived to being 95 years old.
> 정답: My grandmother lived to be 95 years old.

---

**10.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Tom은 일어나 여동생이 울고 있는 것을 봤다.
Tom woke up to see his sister crying.
Tom woke up to seeing his sister crying.
Tom woke up see his sister crying.
Tom woke up seeing his sister crying.
